title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Type-System Trace: Dom Event Types
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts dom event types increment in a typed cancellable data coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Narrow event targets and DOM queries without non-null assertions or unsound global casts.
Propagate AbortSignal and distinguish cancellation, timeout, transport, parsing, and domain failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
